creator: naylor.b.david@gmail.com
text:
On Thursday, 5 April 2012 22:37:48 Gerald Pfeifer wrote:
> On Sun, 1 Apr 2012, David Naylor wrote:
> > A note, wine-gecko will probably need to be split into a stable and
> > development ports to correspond to the respective wine ports.
> 
> Darn, I had hoped we can avoid that at least for a while?

Based on http://wiki.winehq.org/Gecko Wine switched to a newer version of 
gecko with 1.5.0, so zero chance :-(

Would you like me to prepare a wine-devel-gecko port?  It is just a trivial 
change to wine-gecko (it even shouldn't conflict with wine-gecko, mostly).  

> > And, if it helps, a naive patch to update wine to 1.5.0.
> 
> Thanks.  I sorted pkg-plist and adjusted COMMENT and added the
> --without-opencl configure option and committed this.

A pleasure.
